top_signals.title: Hormuz Traffic Thins Friday as Shipowners Err on Side of Safety
top_signals.summary: Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz appeared to thin early on Friday, just a day after a burst of oil flows through the waterway as the US and Iran vowed to lift a dual blockade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Edges Higher as Uncertainty Clouds US-Iran Truce
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rose on Friday as the prospect of a lasting truce between the U.S. and Iran was clouded after peace talks in Switzerland were called off and as Israel stepped up attacks on Lebanon.By 0645 GMT, Brent crude futures LCOc1 gained 51 cents, or 0.64%, to $80.36 a barrel, and U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Absa to Lift Kenya Unit Stake to 85% in $239 Million Tender
top_signals.summary: South Africa’s Absa Group Ltd. plans to raise its stake in its Kenyan unit to 85% through a $238.7 million tender offer, underscoring its confidence in East Africa’s growth prospects.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Anthropic’s Co-Founder and Top Economist on Doing Research at the AI Frontier
top_signals.summary: A conversation with Jack Clark and Peter McCrory.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Abu Dhabi Tells Buyers to Load Oil Shipments From Inside Hormuz - Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: Abu Dhabi Tells Buyers to Load Oil Shipments From Inside Hormuz  Bloomberg
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Rio Tinto’s Oyu Tolgoi resumes exports after Mongolia blockade
top_signals.summary: Shipments returned to normal one day after protesters disrupted transport from Mongolia's flagship copper mine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Europe’s refugee population stabilizes after decade of growth, study shows
top_signals.summary: The number of ​refugees and asylum seekers in the European Union and Britain stood at 9.59 million in 2025, little changed from ⁠9.58 million a year earlier.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Schipper Takes the Helm of Netherlands Coast Guard
top_signals.summary: The Netherlands Coast Guard has appointed Klaasjan Schipper as its new director, succeeding Nicole Kuipers, who led the organization since 2022.Schipper officially assumed the role on June 17 during a handover ceremony in Den Helder, becoming the tenth director in the Coast Guard's history.
